rationale: Both papers are JMR editorials about journal governance and standards: the 2024 citing paper sets a new editorial agenda (rigor/relevance, triangulation, transparency), while the 2014 cited paper documents prior JMR editorial policies, process outcomes, and publishability criteria. Given this direct topical and institutional continuity—and the citing note explicitly says it extends prior JMR discussions—this citation is plausibly foundational rather than a mere incidental mention.
